column4:
WowVegas is a shell of it's former self, no more Happy Hours, Daily SC completely downgraded, fees with purchases, just completely terrible. 
They now offer "Flash Sales' and 'MegaWheels' which will net you around 1%-5% extra SC, so just not worth it.
WowVegas is worth it if you're a new player and you want to collect your Welcome Package, collect the Welcome Package and follow the guide down below. 
If you don't want to collect Free SC from the forms you can easily purchase a Megawheel to hit the minimum redemption and quickly get your money out.
WowVegas is no longer worth for players that are consistently trying to grind SC. 

What is worth on it:

One of the only things that remain constant for this platform is the fact that you can get your Free $1-$2 through the forms they send out on their social medias.
You can farm these everyday and after awhile you can redeem these for free money.
One of the best ways of doing this is by joining the Crossroads Discord and getting the #giveaways role in our Get Your Roles Channel!
These are pinged whenever they come out and you will be pinged when the Free SC forms and any other Free SC comes out.

What I do to claim this money, I wait till around 30SC-40SC and purchase a Megawheel, the Megawheels are arguably very bad but they have a small RTP you can earn to them, you can expect from 1% to 5%,
this will allow you to get over the Minimum Redemption amount in combination with your Free SC you have claimed, you'll usually have around 130SC after this.

Then playythrough with the recommended games on this sheet and then redeem your monthly allowance of Free Money from WowVegas.

RTP should be around 96%-97% after your playthrough but in reality it will be around 125%-130% in addition to your Free SC.

With the below strategy you can earn a free $80 a month!
Personally I will buy the $499.99 pack and this gives you 4,500,000 gold coins. 
You can then wash the SC you get playing Blackjack and typically average around 97% RTP.

With the gold coins you can play Luckyland 7's or Starspell Burst mode.

Luckyland 7's allow you to do 250GC spins and it relatively has a safe RTP but will take you a long time to grind out your VIP Tier.

ETA of Vip
Blue Duck: 16-18 Hours of Constant Spinning
Yellow Duck: 90-92 Hours of Constant Spinning

Starspell Burst mode is way more volatile but in the long run it also has a consistently safe RTP. 
This will speed up your VIP Tier process but it can also shred through your Gold Coins if you get unlucky with your spins.

Yellow Duck: 30-34 Hours of Constant Spinning
